title: ranunculus gmelinii f. prolificus
intro: Ranunculus gmelinii f. prolificus, also known as Gmelin's buttercup, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the ranunculus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus gmelinii f. prolificus include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
